display: Lord of the Rings: Return to Moria Dedicated Server ARM64

password.desc: Set the join password for your server (leave blank for none).

port.desc: UDP port the server will bind to.

commands: sh -c 'mkdir -p /tmp/moria && until [ -f /tmp/moria/MoriaServer.exe ]; do if [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd ]; then box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +login anonymous +app_info_print 3349480 +quit > /dev/null; else steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +login anonymous +app_info_print 3349480 +quit > /dev/null; fi && box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +force_install_dir /tmp/moria +login anonymous +app_update 3349480 validate +quit; if [ ! -f /tmp/moria/MoriaServer.exe ]; then echo "SteamCMD failed or crashed, retrying..."; sleep 2; fi; done && cp -r /tmp/moria/. . && rm -rf /tmp/moria'

run.command: sh -c 'id -u moria >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd -m moria || adduser -D moria; mkdir -p /home/moria/.steam/sdk64; if [ -f ./linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp ./linux64/steamclient.so /home/moria/.steam/sdk64/; elif [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so /home/moria/.steam/sdk64/; fi; chown -R moria:moria . /home/moria/.steam; if [ ! -f Moria/Saved/Config/WindowsServer/MoriaServerConfig.ini ]; then echo "No config found, running once to generate it..."; runuser -u moria -- env PATH="/wine-installer/bin:$PATH" WINEPREFIX="/home/moria/.wine" xvfb-run --auto-servernum --server-args="-screen 0 640x480x24:32" box64 wine ./MoriaServer.exe -log & GEN_PID=$!; sleep 30; kill $GEN_PID 2>/dev/null; wait $GEN_PID 2>/dev/null; fi; CFG=Moria/Saved/Config/WindowsServer/MoriaServerConfig.ini; if [ -f "$CFG" ]; then sed -i "s/^ServerName=.*/ServerName=${name}/" "$CFG" || echo "ServerName=${name}" >> "$CFG"; sed -i "s/^ServerPassword=.*/ServerPassword=${password}/" "$CFG" || echo "ServerPassword=${password}" >> "$CFG"; sed -i "s/^MaxPlayers=.*/MaxPlayers=${players}/" "$CFG" || echo "MaxPlayers=${players}" >> "$CFG"; sed -i "s/^Port=.*/Port=${port}/" "$CFG" || echo "Port=${port}" >> "$CFG"; chown moria:moria "$CFG"; fi; exec runuser -u moria -- env PATH="/wine-installer/bin:$PATH" WINEPREFIX="/home/moria/.wine" xvfb-run --auto-servernum --server-args="-screen 0 640x480x24:32" box64 wine ./MoriaServer.exe -log'

name: returntomoria-arm64
